{"code":"# Get all merged pull requests
merged_prs = github.list_pull_requests(state="merged")
print(f"Found {len(merged_prs)} merged PRs")

# Filter PRs that close Linear issues (have closes_linear field)
prs_closing_linear = [pr for pr in merged_prs if pr.closes_linear]
print(f"Found {len(prs_closing_linear)} merged PRs that close Linear issues")
